title: ANGIX Parasol Cover Waterproof 28 x 28, 153cm (Approx) Extra Large Cantilever Patio Umbrella Cover Includes Tie-Down Cords With Zipper for Garden
features: Premium Waterproof Protection :- The parasol cover is made from high-quality waterproof material, keeping your parasol safe from rain, snow, and other outdoor elements. Don't let unpredictable weather ruin your outdoor enjoyment – invest in reliable protection for your parasol.

Extra Large Size :- Measuring 28 x 28 x 153cm (Approx), this patio table parasol cover is designed to fit most extra large garden cantilever patio umbrellas. Whether you have a large parasol or a cantilever umbrella, our cover provides a snug fit for optimal protection.

Secure Fit with Tie-Down Cords and Zipper :- No need to worry about your cover blowing away in strong winds. This garden parasol cover features tie-down cords to secure it in place, along with a zipper for easy installation and removal. Keep your parasol firmly covered and protected at all times.

Durable Construction :- Built to last, this large parasol cover is crafted from durable material that can withstand the rigors of outdoor use. Say goodbye to faded, torn, or damaged parasol covers – ours is designed to maintain its quality and appearance over time.

Long-lasting Performance :- The cantilever parasol cover is designed to offer long-lasting performance, providing reliable protection year after year. With reinforced seams and high-quality stitching, it's built to withstand the test of time and keep your parasol looking like new for seasons to come.
description: Product Description Garden Parasol Cover Parasol Cover Waterproof UV Protection Garden Parasol Cover, Parasol Cover with Drawstring and Zip, Heavy Duty Green Garden Parasol Cover, Protect Your Outdoor Umbrella from Rain, Sun, Dust, and More Convenient Features :- A parasol cover with adjustable drawstring closure ensures a secure, customizable fit for your parasol, offering peace of mind against the elements. Heavy Duty Material :- The garden parasol cover's long-lasting parasol protection is ensured by its heavy-duty construction, which can withstand wind, rain, and UV rays. Easy Zip Closure :- The garden parasol cover Quick & hassle-free application for effortless protection of your parasol. Provides an extra layer of security against wind. Complete Peace of Mind :- The parasol cover is waterproof and UV-resistant, ensuring your parasol's colour stays vibrant and protected from the elements. Enhance Your Outdoor Experience :- The zippered opening allows for effortless covering and uncovering of your umbrella, while the buckle strap ensures a secure and snug fit, even in windy conditions. Extend the lifespan of your outdoor umbrella and elevate your outdoor experience with our premium parasol cover. By providing superior protection against the elements, our cover ensures that your outdoor gatherings, BBQs, picnics, and relaxation moments remain uninterrupted, no matter the weather forecast. Versatile Usage for Various Outdoor Settings :- Perfect for a wide range of outdoor spaces, our parasol cover is ideal for gardens, patios, balconies, and more. Whether you have a single umbrella or a collection of them, our cover offers versatile protection for different types and styles of parasols, including market umbrellas, cantilever umbrellas, and beyond. From scorching summer sun to torrential rain and heavy snowfall, our parasol cover is your umbrella's shield against the elements. Is the parasol cover waterproof? Yes, the cover is made from waterproof material for reliable protection against rain, snow, and outdoor elements. What size is the cover? The cover measures approximately 28 x 28 x 153cm, suitable for most extra large cantilever patio umbrellas. How does it stay secure in windy conditions? A: With tie-down cords and a zipper for a snug fit, ensuring protection even in strong winds. Is it durable? Yes, crafted from durable material designed for outdoor use, maintaining quality over time. Will it maintain its quality? Yes, featuring reinforced seams and high-quality stitching for long-lasting performance.
